project.component: { "keyToString": { "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "javascript.preferred.runtime.type.id": "node", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/Alexa/Documents/DEV/hatmp", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "pnpm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "editor.preferences.appearance", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "ts.external.directory.path": "C:\\Program Files\\JetBrains\\WebStorm 2025.3.1\\plugins\\javascript-plugin\\jsLanguageServicesImpl\\external", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "com.intellij.ide.scratch.ScratchImplUtil$2/Nouveau fichier vide": [ "Markdown" ] } }

MESSAGE.value: Add CI workflow with SonarQube integration for build, test, and coverage
Add SonarQube configuration file for project analysis
Add GitHub Actions workflow for build and SonarQube analysis
Initialize `package.json` with project metadata, scripts, and dependencies
Add Vitest configuration file for unit testing setup
Add Vite configuration file with server setup
Add pnpm workspace configuration file with build dependencies
Add Playwright configuration file for end-to-end testing
Add Dependabot configuration file for automated dependency updates
Add GitHub Actions workflow for Playwright end-to-end tests
Add Playwright end-to-end tests for title and navigation verification
Add a unit test for a sum function using Vitest
